From observing distant galaxies to exploring exoplanets and their atmospheres, BAE Systems enables cutting-edge technology to expand our knowledge of the universe. As a major partner in each of NASA’s […]

signals.title: Poland awards $4.8 billion A26 submarine deal to Saab
signals.summary: Under a separate deal, Warsaw aims to urgently acquire a “gap filler” boat for its Baltic Sea operations that will be used to train its sailors.

signals.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
signals.summary: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.

signals.title: Rocket Lab to acquire Iridium
signals.summary:
Rocket Lab is acquiring satellite telecommunications company Iridium for $8 billion as part of its effort to become an end-to-end space company. 
 The post  Rocket Lab to acquire Iridium  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: IRS says Trump Account contributions will not trigger annual gift tax reporting requirements

signals.title: Virginia defines agrivoltaics, expanding opportunities for solar
signals.summary: Agrivoltaic projects must “ensure flexibility for farmers to adapt to market conditions and support operational needs,” according to the law.

signals.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now
signals.summary: The ruling by the Supreme Court means that Lisa Cook will remain as a Federal Reserve governor as her lawsuit challenging Trump's effort to fire her proceeds.

signals.title: Here's how Trump Accounts could affect women's retirement savings gap
signals.summary: While Trump Accounts are unlikely to directly improve retirement savings among women, there may be an indirect benefit, says one expert.

signals.title: JPMorgan urges strong safeguards as congress weighs crypto market structure rules
USMC awards $20 million contract for first autonomous ground vehicles
signals.summary: The Marine Corps is pursuing a first-of-its-kind $20 million production contract for fully autonomous ground vehicles.

signals.title: Comcast announces it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
signals.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.

signals.title: Comcast's NBCUniversal spinoff raises hope for more deals. There may not be good options
signals.summary: Comcast plans to separate its cable and media divisions over the next year. This could set each company up for M&A, but there might not be any good options.

signals.title: Oil prices rise as U.S. and Iran reach deal to halt attacks, U.S. oil above $70 per barrel again
signals.summary: Oil prices were higher after an agreement between the U.S. and Iran to halt recent hostilities in the Middle East.

signals.title: Salesforce is on an AI buying spree, but Wall Street still has its doubts
signals.summary: The company has announced three deals in the month of June alone.

signals.title: PJM opposes waiver for $2B gas-fired plant in fast-track interconnection review
signals.summary: Gas turbine backlogs prompted Advanced Power Services to seek changes to its project in PJM’s fast-track Reliability Resource Initiative interconnection review, but the grid operator said granting such a waiver would be unfair to other developers.

signals.title: Utilities are not spending enough on low-income efficiency: ACEEE
signals.summary: Energy efficiency becomes more important as prices rise because it is “one of the only direct levers” a household has to reduce their bills, said Anna Johnson, senior policy manager at the American Council for an Energy-Efficient Economy.

signals.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.

signals.title: ESA to seek lunar mapping capability for Argonaut lander
signals.summary:
MILAN — The European Space Agency will rely on external lunar topographic data during the design phase of its Argonaut lunar lander, and possibly for its first mission, while working […]

signals.title: As one Australian Army brigade bulks up with armor, its fuel and ammo needs spike
signals.summary: The formation is expected to burn through 300,000 liters of diesel per day during high-intensity operations, compared with 40,000 liters previously.

signals.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
Eli Lilly, Regeneron among first companies selected for FDA initiative to speed review of new manufacturing facilities
signals.summary: Eli Lilly and Regeneron are among the first seven companies the FDA has selected for its PreCheck Pilot Program, CNBC has learned.

signals.title: Micron's monster post-earnings rally is almost gone. Traders divided on where it goes next
signals.summary: The maker of memory chips slid to start the week, marking an about-face from its post-earnings surge.

signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: Why energy and utilities are moving from ‘systems’ mindset to a ‘connected platform ecosystems’ mindset powered by Vertical AI
signals.summary: How leading providers are connecting customer, workforce and grid operations into one Vertical AI ecosystem.

signals.title: Quantum computing is about to become a national security problem in orbit
signals.summary:
Quantum computing is advancing fast, and nations are racing to field the first machines powerful enough to break modern encryption. This race has direct consequences for the commercial space industry, […] 
 The post  Quantum computing is about to become a national security problem in orbit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SatVu restarts commercial operations with HotSat-2
signals.summary:
British thermal imaging startup SatVu announced the start of commercial services June 29 for HotSat-2, marking a return to revenue-generating operations after its debut satellite failed in low Earth orbit in 2023. 
 The post  SatVu restarts commercial operations with HotSat-2  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US Army wants up to 100 drone boats to fill watercraft gap in Pacific
signals.summary: As the Army contends with a shortage of boats in the Pacific, it's looking at autonomous watercraft to fill the gaps.

signals.title: Israel sells Spyder air defense systems to Romania for $2.3 billion
signals.summary: According to manufacturer Rafael, it's the largest contract in its history.

signals.title: This insurance stock is on an impressive run. How to ride the momentum with less risk
signals.summary: MetLife (MET) is well-positioned in the life insurance and benefits sector, exhibiting fundamental momentum that the broader market hasn't fully priced in.

signals.title: Kalshi traders expect this week's jobs report will disappoint Wall Street outlook
signals.summary: Dow Jones expects over 118,000 jobs will be added, but Kalshi traders give under 60% that over 100,000 jobs will be added.

signals.title: Putin’s fuel shortage admission signals growing strain on Russia’s energy infrastructure
signals.summary: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.

signals.title: Op-ed: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
signals.summary: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

signals.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
signals.summary: ‘Heated Rivalry’ has helped gay romance stories gain mainstream attention, with women driving much of the fandom.

signals.title: Craft Prospect selected for The Sunday Times Scotland Fast 50
signals.summary:
(Glasgow, UK) Glasgow-based space engineering company Craft Prospect has been selected for inclusion in the inaugural edition of The Sunday Times Scotland Fast 50, a new annual list recognising some […]

signals.title: China establishes VLEO industry alliance as satellites demonstrate sustained low-orbit operations
signals.summary:
HELSINKI — China has established a national very low Earth orbit industry alliance, as multiple satellites demonstrate sustained operations below 300 kilometers and propulsion startups attract investment. China established a […]

signals.title: Oil prices near pre-war levels  —  but persistent supply risks could spark a rebound, analysts warn
signals.summary: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.

signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.

signals.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
signals.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.

signals.title: Protein coffee? Brands cash in on functional beverage boom
signals.summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

signals.title: China widens Japan export curbs, targeting drone makers, nuclear firms and defense institutes
signals.summary: China blacklisted four of Japan's government defense research institutes and placed dozens more Japanese firms under tightened export restrictions Monday.

signals.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
signals.summary: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

signals.title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
signals.summary: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

signals.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
signals.summary: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

signals.title: US strikes Iranian missile, drone, radar sites
signals.summary: The U.S. struck Iranian missile, drone and radar sites on Friday, U.S. Central Command said.

signals.title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
signals.summary: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.
